headline: **MLB Daily Recap: May 9, 2026**
article:
The Toronto Blue Jays dominated the Los Angeles Angels 14-1 in a one-sided matchup, with Brandon Valenzuela leading the Angels' offense. The Oakland Athletics secured a 6-2 victory over the Baltimore Orioles, with Brent Rooker leading the offense and Aaron Civale dominating on the mound. The Houston Astros were defeated by the Cincinnati Reds with a final score of 1-3.

Several players have been impacted by injuries, with Justin Verlander being transferred to the 60-day injured list due to left hip inflammation. Kerry Carpenter was placed on the 10-day injured list with a left AC Joint Sprain. The Los Angeles Dodgers have also made several roster moves, including transferring Edwin Díaz to the 60-day injured list and placing Brock Stewart on the 15-day injured list.

The San Francisco Giants traded catcher Patrick Bailey to the Cleveland Guardians for left-hander Matt Wilkinson and other considerations. The Baltimore Orioles acquired right-hander Enyel Garcia and right-hander Maicol Lauriano from the Philadelphia Phillies in exchange for cash. The Athletics traded right-hander Tyler Ferguson to the Chicago Cubs.

top_news.title: **Angels Suffer Historic Loss to Blue Jays**
top_news.summary: The Toronto Blue Jays dominated the Los Angeles Angels 14-1 in a one-sided matchup. Brandon Valenzuela led the Angels' offense with 4 hits, 1 home run, and 4 RBIs.

top_news.title: **Athletics Take Down Orioles 6-2**
top_news.summary: The Oakland Athletics secured a 6-2 victory over the Baltimore Orioles, with Brent Rooker leading the offense and Aaron Civale dominating on the mound. Civale earned the win with 5.0 innings pitched, 6 strikeouts, and 0 earned runs.

top_news.title: **Astros Fall to Reds in Cincinnati**
top_news.summary: The Houston Astros were defeated by the Cincinnati Reds with a final score of 1-3. Braden Shewmake led the Astros' offense with a home run and one RBI.

top_news.title: **Marlins Come from Behind to Win 8-7**
top_news.summary: The Miami Marlins overcame a 7-5 deficit to defeat the Washington Nationals 8-7 in a thrilling matchup. Kyle Stowers led the Nationals with 3 hits, including a home run, while Richard Lovelady pitched 2 scoreless innings for the Nationals.

top_news.title: **Nationals Fall Short in Miami**
top_news.summary: The Washington Nationals suffered a 2-5 loss to the Miami Marlins, marking their defeat in the matchup. Impact players for the Nationals included Luis García Jr., Daylen Lile, and Heriberto Hernández.

top_news.title: **Orioles Take Down Athletics in Thrilling 1-2 Victory**
top_news.summary: The Baltimore Orioles secured a narrow win over the Athletics, with Gunnar Henderson and Dylan Beavers emerging as key contributors in the matchup.

top_news.title: **Verlander Shifts to 60-Day IL**
top_news.summary: Detroit Tigers right-hander Justin Verlander has been transferred to the 60-day injured list due to left hip inflammation. He was initially placed on the 15-day injured list.

top_news.title: **Giants Make Key Trade Addition**
top_news.summary: The San Francisco Giants acquired left-handed pitcher Matt Wilkinson from the Cleveland Guardians in exchange for catcher Patrick Bailey.
